name: Remoulade with Vegetable Crudites
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine mustard, oil, catsup, vinegar, and Tabasco sauce.
2. Add finely chopped celery, onion, and green pepper to the mixture.
3. Stir in cherry tomatoes, mushroom slices, cucumber slices, celery slices, and carrot slices.
4. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
5. Serve the dip with whole vegetables and sliced vegetables.
